name: ibyza-e2e
description: IBYZA — Suite E2E con Serenity/JS Screenplay Pattern + Cucumber + Playwright

scripts.test: cucumber-js features --import src/step-definitions/hooks.js --import src/step-definitions/navegacion.steps.js --import src/step-definitions/inicio.steps.js --import src/step-definitions/proyectos.steps.js --import src/step-definitions/contacto.steps.js --import src/step-definitions/separacion.steps.js --import src/step-definitions/admin.steps.js --format progress --format summary
